sentences.english: I got new glasses last week.
At first everything looked strange and the world seemed bigger.
sentences.korean: 처음에는 모든 게 이상해 보이고 세상이 더 커 보였어요.

sentences.english: But now I can see the board clearly from the back of the class.
sentences.korean: 하지만 이제 교실 뒤에서도 칠판이 잘 보여요.

sentences.english: I chose a round black frame because it looks cool.
sentences.korean: 멋져 보여서 둥근 검정 프레임을 골랐어요.

sentences.english: My friends say I look like a professor.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
